title: crambe tataria var. aspera
intro: Crambe tataria var. aspera, also known as the Siberian sea rocket or wild cabbage, is a perennial plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Crambe tataria var. aspera is typically prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications to treat skin conditions.
